sources: AAMC 2025 Facts: Applicants and Matriculants Data
Association of American Dental Schools (ADEA) Official Guide 2025
Student Doctor Network (SDN) Accepted Data Compilation

smart.label: Academic Rigor
what_counts: Science GPA (sGPA) - Biology, Chemistry, Physics, Math - weighted separately by AAMC
MCAT score (critical: all four sections scored)
Rigorous science coursework: Orgo, Biochem, Physics, Genetics, Physiology
Research coursework, honors thesis in science
Advanced coursework: upper-division Bio, Chem, or related
what_does_not_count: GPA without science breakdown for pre-med applications
Non-science honors that don't demonstrate science rigor

grit.label: Sustained Commitment
what_counts: Leadership in pre-med or science organizations
Overcoming adversity or non-traditional path to medicine
what_does_not_count: Leadership titles without owned outcomes or member impact

build.label: Healthcare Profile
what_counts: Clinical hours with direct patient contact (EMT, scribe, CNA, hospital volunteer, clinic volunteer)
Shadowing hours (across multiple specialties preferred; MD and DO shadowing for DO apps)
Research (wet lab, clinical research, IRB involvement, publications, conference presentations)
Community service and public health experience

common_gaps.gap: No MCAT score or prep signal
common_gaps.fix: MCAT is required for every MD/DO program. Aim 510+ for most MD programs, 505+ for DO. Retake if score is below these thresholds.
100 hours is the bare minimum. Competitive applicants have 200+. Add an EMT certification, hospital volunteering, or medical scribe role.
Adcoms want evidence you know what you're signing up for. Shadow at least 2-3 physicians in different specialties. 40+ hours minimum.
Post-bacc coursework or SMPs (Special Master's Programs) are standard ways to demonstrate academic recovery for borderline sGPAs.

common_gaps.gap: No research experience (for MD research-focused programs)
common_gaps.fix: Join a lab through your department, PI email outreach, or URCA programs. Even a semester of data analysis with a faculty member counts.

common_gaps.gap: Volunteer work is all one-time events, not sustained
common_gaps.fix: Pick one organization and commit for a full year. Adcoms want to see follow-through, not event-hopping.

common_gaps.gap: Clinical experience only in one setting or specialty
common_gaps.fix: Diversify across at least 2 settings (e.g., hospital + free clinic, or ER + outpatient). Shows breadth of understanding of medicine.

priorities: Clear research or academic medicine trajectory
school_tiers.notes: Research experience is essentially required. Publications or presentations dramatically increase odds. Aim 520+ MCAT and 3.85+ sGPA.
More holistic than top-10. Clinical depth and service orientation matter as much as numbers. Strong personal statement can compensate for borderline stats.
Strong in-state preference dramatically improves odds. Out-of-state applicants need to be near top-25 caliber to compete.

priorities: Commitment to primary care or family medicine
school_tiers.notes: DO programs require shadowing a DO physician specifically. All DO programs are accredited and eligible for residency matching. Primary care orientation is valued.
